question: How many days apart were Quantinuum's Nasdaq debut and SpaceX's Nasdaq debut in June 2026?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
Quantinuum's Nasdaq debut was on June 4, 2026, and SpaceX's Nasdaq debut was on June 12, 2026. That makes them **8 days apart**.

Sources:
- https://www.cnbc.com/2026/06/04/quantinuum-qnt-stock-first-trade-ipo.html
- https://www.cnbc.com/2026/06/12/spacex-ipo-spcx-live-updates.html

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer:
